name: desktop
description: Electron main process for Offline Learning App
author: NavGurukul

scripts.copy-preload: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/preload', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('src/preload/secure.cjs', 'dist/preload/secure.cjs')"
scripts.build:installer: pnpm build && pnpm --filter renderer build && npx cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.publish:installer: pnpm build && pnpm --filter renderer build && npx cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs -p always
